title: Release 0.4.0 preparation — version bump, changelog, publish checklist
purpose: Phase 4 JIT/AOT compilation is complete (21 briefs, 1247+ tests). The cleanup briefs (B-165 through B-168) fix GC safety and code organisation. B-169 wires higher-order BIF trampolines. B-170 replaces OTP stdlib stubs. B-171 fixes correctness bugs. Once these land, the crate is ready for a 0.4.0 release with JIT compilation as the headline feature. This brief covers the mechanical release tasks: version bump, changelog generation, crates.io publish preparation, and pre-publish validation.
task: Bump version to 0.4.0 in all Cargo.toml files, write a CHANGELOG entry summarizing Phase 4 additions, verify crates.io publish readiness (no path dependencies, license, description, repository fields), and create a release checklist.

requirements.title: Version bump to 0.4.0
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL update the version field to "0.4.0" in crates/beamr/Cargo.toml and crates/gleam-types/Cargo.toml. THE SYSTEM SHALL update any workspace-level version if present. THE SYSTEM SHALL update inter-crate dependency versions to match (beamr depends on gleam-types).
acceptance: crates/beamr/Cargo.toml version = "0.4.0"
crates/gleam-types/Cargo.toml version = "0.4.0"
cargo check succeeds with updated versions
No version mismatches in dependency declarations

requirements.title: CHANGELOG entry for 0.4.0
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL create or update CHANGELOG.md with a 0.4.0 section. THE SYSTEM SHALL list: JIT compilation via Cranelift (always-on), AOT compilation with Gleam type sidecar, single-binary packaging with embedded .beam files, differential testing framework, Criterion benchmarks, adaptive JIT threshold tuning, and the new gleam-types crate. THE SYSTEM SHALL list breaking changes if any (e.g. new SharedState fields, new process fields).
acceptance: CHANGELOG.md contains a ## 0.4.0 section
JIT compilation listed as headline feature
AOT compilation, packaging, differential testing listed
gleam-types crate mentioned
Breaking changes section present if applicable

requirements.title: crates.io publish readiness
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL verify that both crates have the required crates.io metadata: license, description, repository, and readme fields in Cargo.toml. THE SYSTEM SHALL verify no path-only dependencies that would prevent publish. THE SYSTEM SHALL run cargo publish --dry-run for both crates to validate publishability.
acceptance: cargo publish --dry-run -p gleam-types succeeds
cargo publish --dry-run -p beamr succeeds
Both Cargo.toml files have license, description, repository fields
No path-only dependencies without version fallback

requirements.title: Pre-release validation
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL pass all lib tests, all integration tests, and all differential tests before release. THE SYSTEM SHALL verify that the benchmark binary compiles. THE SYSTEM SHALL verify clippy produces no errors. THE SYSTEM SHALL verify cargo doc builds without errors.
acceptance: cargo test --package beamr --lib passes
cargo test --package beamr --test '*' passes
cargo bench --package beamr --no-run succeeds
cargo clippy --package beamr passes
cargo doc --package beamr --no-deps succeeds

requirements.title: Release SHALL NOT constraints
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL NOT publish to crates.io without explicit approval from the project lead. THE SYSTEM SHALL NOT include debug or development-only code in the release (no eprintln!, no #[cfg(test)] code in lib paths, no TODO panic). THE SYSTEM SHALL NOT release with any known GC safety bugs open (B-165 must be merged first).
acceptance: No eprintln! or dbg! in non-test code
No TODO-panic patterns in production code
B-165 GC fix is on main before version bump
git tag v0.4.0 created but not pushed until approved

verification: cargo test --package beamr --lib && cargo clippy --package beamr && cargo publish --dry-run -p beamr
